architecture: Client-Server Authoritative with Client Prediction & Lag Compensation

replication.playerTransform: Interpolated 30Hz network transforms with 100ms smoothing buffer
replication.combatHitscan: Server-side raycast verification against historical lag-compensated hitboxes
replication.projectiles: Server-spawned network objects with client-side visual prediction
replication.lootAndVehicles: Server-owned state machines with RPC ownership transfer on interact

bandwidthTarget: <= 15 KB/s per client during peak 50-player combat
